scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @albumsl/web run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:functions && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @albumsl/domain run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/contracts run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/application run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/infra-firebase run build
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:packages && vitest run --passWithNoTests packages functions apps scripts
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project albumsl-test --only firestore "vitest run tests/firestore/firestore.rules.test.ts"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm --workspace @albumsl/functions run typecheck && npm --workspace @albumsl/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @albumsl/web run typecheck
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run format:check
scripts.deploy:dev:hosting: npm run build:web && firebase deploy --project dev --only hosting
scripts.deploy:dev:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --project dev --only functions
scripts.deploy:dev:spark: npm run deploy:dev:rules && npm run deploy:dev:hosting
scripts.deploy:prod:hosting: npm run build:web && firebase deploy --project prod --only hosting
scripts.deploy:prod:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --project prod --only functions
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && firebase deploy --project prod
